caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring an interview or discussion about a book titled "No More Time: Climate Crisis Poems" by Greg Delanty. The scene is split into two frames, showing Margaret Harrington on the left and Greg Delanty on the right. In the first frame, Greg Delanty is holding up his book, likely introducing it or discussing its content, while Margaret Harrington listens attentively. In the second frame, Greg Delanty continues speaking, possibly elaborating on the themes of the book or sharing insights related to the climate crisis. The setting suggests a professional yet casual conversation, with both participants engaged in a meaningful dialogue about the pressing issue of climate change.
